mermaidSyntax:
flowchart TD A[Raw sequencing reads
FASTQ files] --> B[Quality control
FastQC + Trimmomatic] B --> C[Genome assembly
SPAdes / MEGAHIT] C --> D[Gene prediction
Prodigal / Augustus] D --> E[Functional annotation
InterProScan + eggNOG] E --> F[Quality validation
BUSCO completeness check] F --> G{Passes QC?} G -->|Yes| H[Submit to NCBI GenBank] G -->|No| I[Review and rerun
failed steps] I --> B
